_comment: RS Water — Phase B1 opponent deck. Four basic + Stage 1 lines (Mudkip/Marshtomp, Magikarp/Gyarados, Corphish/Crawdaunt, Horsea/Seadra) plus 32 Water Energy. All Pokemon's typed attack costs are Water-only — Barboach/Whiscash were swapped out because Mud Slap / Magnitude require FIGHTING energy that this deck can't pay.
